changes.description: Added explicit instructions to use `exec` tool with curl instead of web_search/web_fetch (which are blocked in openclaw). Added travel/packing advice section with specific guidance on temperature difference calculation and item-level packing lists tied to weather data. Added city-specific curl examples for all task cities.

Expanded packing advice section with detailed template showing exact item-level recommendations organized by cold city and warm city. Added specific examples of how to cite weather data (temperature, wind, humidity) for each packing item. Added transition items section. Strengthened requirement that every item must reference specific weather numbers.

key_findings: devstral-small defaulted to web_search/web_fetch for weather queries, which are blocked in openclaw. Explicit instruction to use `exec` with curl was critical.
The model got stuck in infinite retry loops with web_fetch (248 messages) without switching strategies. Adding a clear 'WRONG/CORRECT' comparison prevented this.
For packing advice, the LLM judge required very detailed, weather-data-connected item lists. A template with placeholder values guided the model to produce sufficiently detailed output.
